cards.title: Monolith Architect

ability.name: Geometric Reinforcement
ability.text: Taunt. Armor 1. When this unit enters play, grant an allied unit Armor 2 until end of turn.

cards.image_prompt: An elderly stone golem architect with moss-covered granite skin, intricate glowing golden amber sigils etched into his chest, holding a floating crystalline hammer, standing in a crumbling mountain pass, dramatic low-angle shot, shafts of warm amber light piercing through dark clouds.
cards.image_notes: Cinematic dark fantasy art style, deep shadows, mossy textures, hyper-detailed granite surfaces, golden ember glow, portrait orientation 3:4.
